text.heading: NOTICE TO GUESTS
text.p: Please note that guests are not allowed to owe.
Therefore, ensure that your bills are settled well in advance to avoid any embarrassment.
A SAFE-DEPOSIT IS AVAILABLE IN THE ACCOUNTANT'S OFFICE FOR GUEST VALUABELS. GUESTS ARE ADVISED NOT TO LEAVE CASH, OR VALUABLES IN THEIR BEDROOMS. ANY LOSS INCURED IS AT OWNER'S RISK.
